description: Decode tail latency breakdown: DP sync, DeepEP collectives, ITL, and fabric health on GB200 NVL72

panels.description: P50/P95/P99 inter-token latency across all decode ranks
panels.title: Inter-Token Latency (Decode)

panels.description: Per-pod P99 ITL to identify straggler ranks
panels.title: ITL P99 per Pod (Straggler Detection)

panels.description: P50/P95/P99 DP metadata sync latency (UCX RDMA allreduce)
panels.title: DP Sync Latency (Decode vs Prefill)

panels.description: P50/P95/P99 latency for DeepEP dispatch (expert all-to-all send)
panels.title: DeepEP Dispatch Latency

panels.description: P50/P95/P99 latency for DeepEP combine (expert all-to-all receive)
panels.title: DeepEP Combine Latency

panels.description: Per-pod DP sync P99 to identify straggler ranks that arrive late at the allreduce
panels.title: DP Sync P99 per Pod (Straggler Detection)

panels.description: DeepEP dispatch and combine operations per second across all decode ranks
panels.title: DeepEP Operation Rate

panels.description: InfiniBand link errors: link_downed, error_recovery, symbol_error, local_link_integrity. Non-zero rates correlate with RDMA transport stalls.
panels.title: InfiniBand Link Errors

panels.description: TCP retransmissions and timeouts. Spikes correlate with transport stalls and DP coordination delays.
panels.title: TCP Retransmits & Timeouts

panels.description: NVLink TX/RX throughput per GPU from profiling counters. Shows actual aggregate traffic through the NVLink fabric.
panels.title: NVLink TX/RX Throughput per GPU

panels.description: NIXL KV cache transfer duration per pod. Spikes indicate RDMA transfer delays that stall sample_tokens.
panels.title: NIXL Transfer Duration per Pod

panels.description: NIXL post-transfer time (wait_for_save + completion processing) per pod.
panels.title: NIXL Post Time per Pod

panels.description: NIXL transfer failures and notification failures. Non-zero indicates RDMA transport issues.
panels.title: NIXL Transfer Failures & Expired KV

panels.description: Bytes transferred per NIXL operation and throughput.
panels.title: NIXL Transfer Throughput per Pod

panels.description: Overlay: DP Sync P99 vs ITL P99. If DP sync spikes track ITL spikes, the allreduce is on the critical path.
panels.title: DP Sync P99 vs ITL P99 vs Dispatch P99 (Correlation)

title: Decode Tail Latency Observability
